note: Curve StableSwap-NG plain 2-coin pool on Base: superOETHb/WETH (~$16M, the highest-TVL Curve pool on Base). coin0=WETH 0x4200…0006, coin1=superOETHb 0xdbfefd2e…. This Base blueprint uses DYNAMIC uint256[] arrays for add/remove/imbalance (vs the mainnet pools' fixed uint256[2]) — different selectors, same curve_v1 venue + decode (0 core code). Verified ABI = Sourcify (partial match). 10 cover (exchange/add_liquidity/remove_liquidity/remove_liquidity_one_coin/remove_liquidity_imbalance + receiver) · 12 exclude (2 exchange_received router-opt, 1 remove_liquidity claim-admin-fees bool overload, 3 erc20 LP + permit, 6 admin).
